title: EVISU Official Online Store
description: Official EVISU storefront focused on polished shopping flows, responsive UI, and a premium retail presentation. Built around Shopify with custom frontend behaviors and supporting Node.js integration work.

title: 9Proxy
description: An affordable and versatile residential proxy network for seamless global data collection, offering exceptional performance and reliability even when operating at a large scale. Built the modern front-end dashboard featuring interactive country-level geo-targeting, real-time usage monitoring, and stable session management integrations.

title: Best Bean Best Cup
description: A premium e-commerce storefront for an artisanal coffee brand, designed to present a compelling product story and maximize customer conversions. Features custom Shopify templates, optimized product pages, dynamic filters, and custom interactive behaviors using jQuery.
